response.justification: Bogdan possesses over two decades of strong software engineering and full-stack development experience, as well as a commendable entrepreneurial background. However, the Principal Engineer role requires Director-level strategic leadership and deep, recognized expertise in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning. His profile lacks the advanced AI focus, high-level technical strategy experience, and strategic customer advisory background necessary to successfully drive enterprise AI strategy at this seniority level.
strengths: Over 25 years of extensive software, infrastructure, and full-stack engineering experience.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial experience as the founder of an open-source Geo-Data platform.
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, developer tooling, and cloud deployments.
concerns: Lacks the recognized, deep expertise in AI/ML and AI product strategy expected for a Director-level role.
Does not possess an advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field.
Experience is primarily in tactical full-stack development rather than high-level technical strategy and customer advisory.
